insight: Mute.Prevent_Commands matches the base command label case-insensitively with the leading slash optional, so "/mail" also blocks "/mail send" but namespaced forms like "/cmi:broadcast" must be listed separately. Since the CMI bypass fix (post 12.1.14), entries with exactly one argument ("/cmi broadcast", "/mail send") match that subcommand only; on older versions such entries silently never match, a common reason users report Prevent_Commands "not working".
